memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir Knight Thomas Lewknor (1392 – 22 June 1452)
memoryArtifacts.description:
About Sir Thomas de Lewknor, of Horsted Keynes
He was Knight of the Shire (Member of the House of Commons). A Lancastrian, he was attainted under Richard III.

http://thepeerage.com/p19972.htm …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Lewknor於1392年出生在英國素可霍斯特德 凱恩斯時，他的父親Sir Roger Lewknor of Horsted Keynes Sussex53歲，母親Elizabeth de Carew20歲。他於1417年10月24日之前與Philippa Dalyngruge結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1415年登記服兵役。他於1426年在英國素可被列為sheriff of surrey and sussex。他去世於1452年在英國素可享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Lewknor于1392年出生在英国素可霍斯特德 凱恩斯时，他的父亲Sir Roger Lewknor of Horsted Keynes Sussex53岁，母亲Elizabeth de Carew20岁。他于1417年10月24日之前与Philippa Dalyngruge结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1415年登记服兵役。他于1426年在英国素可被列为sheriff of surrey and sussex。他去世于1452年在英国素可享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Lewknor was born in 1392, in Horsted Keynes, Sussex, England, his father, Sir Roger Lewknor of Horsted Keynes Sussex, was 53 and his mother, Elizabeth de Carew, was 20. He married Philippa Dalyngruge before 24 October 1417. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1415. In 1426, at the age of 34, his occupation is listed as sheriff of surrey and sussex in Sussex, England. He died in 1452, in Sussex, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Lewknor est né en 1392, à Horsted Keynes, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger Lewknor of Horsted Keynes Sussex, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Carew, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Philippa Dalyngruge avant 24 octobre 1417. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. En 1426, à l’âge de 34 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of surrey and sussex à Sussex, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1452, à Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Lewknor 1392 in Horsted Keynes, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Lewknor of Horsted Keynes Sussex 53 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Carew 20. Er hat vor 24. Oktober 1417 Philippa Dalyngruge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1426, als er 34 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of surrey and sussex in Sussex, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1452 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Lewknor è nato il nel 1392 nel Horsted Keynes, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir Roger Lewknor of Horsted Keynes Sussex, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Carew, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Philippa Dalyngruge prima del 24 ottobre 1417. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Nel 1426, all'età di 34 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of surrey and sussex nel Sussex, England. Morì nel 1452, nel Sussex, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Lewknorが1392年にイギリススセックスホールステド ケインスで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Lewknor of Horsted Keynes Sussexは53歳，母Elizabeth de Carewは20歳であった。1417年10月24日以前にPhilippa Dalyngrugeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。1426年，34歳の時，イギリススセックスでの職業はsheriff of surrey and sussexと記録されている。彼は1452年にイギリススセックスで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Lewknor(이)가 1392년 영국 수세스 호르스테드 케인스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Lewknor of Horsted Keynes Sussex(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Carew(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1417년 10월 24일 이전 Philippa Dalyngruge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1426년, 34세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 수세스에서 sheriff of surrey and sussex이었다. 그는 1452년 영국 수세스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Postling, Kent, England: Postling, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Lewknor nasceu em 1392, em Horsted Keynes, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger Lewknor of Horsted Keynes Sussex, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Carew, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa Dalyngruge antes 24 de outubro de 1417. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Em 1426, com 34 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of surrey and sussex em Sussex, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1452, em Sussex, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Lewknor родился в 1392 г. в местности хаурстед кинесь, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Lewknor of Horsted Keynes Sussex было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Carew, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa Dalyngruge перед 24 октябрь 1417 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1426 году, в возрасте 34 лет, работал по профессии sheriff of surrey and sussex в местности суссекс, Англия. Он умер в 1452 г. в местности суссекс, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Lewknor nació en 1392, en Horsted Keynes, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger Lewknor of Horsted Keynes Sussex, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Carew, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Philippa Dalyngruge antes de 24 de octubre de 1417. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. En 1426, a la edad de 34 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of surrey and sussex en Sussex, Inglaterra. Murió en 1452, en Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
